product_overview: Desktop-focused file organizer that scans folders, uses Gemini AI to classify files, proposes organize plans and can back up/restore user-selected folders with streaming encryption. Navigation is single-page (sidebar-driven) and core file I/O runs via the Electron main process.
core_goals: Enable users to scan local folders, classify files with Google Gemini, and preview or execute intelligent file organization plans.
Provide a secure, streaming, encrypted backup/restore system for user-selected folders and drives (.mfab format).
Surface progress, logs and history for scanning, AI analysis, organizing and backup operations while working reliably in an Electron desktop environment.

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Left-hand navigation that switches the app view between Dashboard, Organizer, History, Backup and Settings without page reloads.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Dashboard view -> See dashboard statistics (file type and size breakdown)
Navigate to / -> Switch to Backup view -> See a warning or inline note if running in browser-only mode that file system operations require Electron

features.name: Folder Picker
features.description: Allow the user to choose a source folder (or enter a path) to scan for files to analyze and organize.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Organizer view -> Pick a source folder via system folder dialog or enter a valid folder path -> Confirm source folder appears in list -> Start folder scan -> See scanned file list populate
Navigate to / -> Switch to Organizer view -> Enter a non-existent or inaccessible folder path -> Start folder scan -> See error toast indicating folder not found or file system unavailable

features.name: File Scanner & AI Analyzer
features.description: Scan selected folders to enumerate files and optionally send batches to Gemini AI to receive category predictions and metadata.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Organizer view -> Complete folder scan and see list of scanned files -> Trigger AI analysis for scanned files -> See real-time analysis progress updates (percent, current file) -> See analyzed file categories displayed

Navigate to / -> Switch to Organizer view -> Complete folder scan and trigger AI analysis without a valid Gemini API key configured -> See error toast indicating missing or invalid API key and analysis does not start

features.name: Organize Plan & Execute
features.description: Present an AI-suggested organize plan that groups files by category; allow inclusion/exclusion of items and execute file moves via the Electron main process.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Organizer view -> View suggested organize plan grouped by categories after AI analysis -> Toggle inclusion of specific files to refine the plan -> Execute the organize plan -> See success toasts and updated file locations reflected in UI and history

Navigate to / -> Switch to Organizer view -> Attempt to execute an organize plan while running in browser-only mode or without Electron file APIs available -> See error toast indicating file operations are unavailable and no files are moved

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Provide overview statistics and charts for scanned files including type distribution, sizes and category breakdown.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Dashboard view -> See file type distribution and size statistics populated after at least one successful scan
Navigate to / -> Switch to Dashboard view -> Open the app before any scans have run -> See an empty-state prompt advising to scan a folder

features.name: History Page
features.description: List past organize and backup sessions with details of files moved, timestamps and allow clearing history.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to History view -> See list of past organize sessions with their moved files and timestamps -> Open a session to view its moved-file details
Navigate to / -> Switch to History view -> Attempt to clear history when no sessions exist -> See inline message indicating there is no history to clear

features.name: File Backup Panel
features.description: Create encrypted, streaming backups of selected folders/drives into a compressed .mfab archive, show live progress and support restore operations.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Backup view -> Add one or more source folders to the backup list -> Choose a destination path for the backup file -> Enter and confirm an encryption password -> Start backup -> See live progress updates (phase, percent, current file, files/bytes processed) -> See completion success toast when done

Navigate to / -> Switch to Backup view -> Start a backup while running in browser-only mode or without required file permissions -> See error state and error toast indicating file system or permission failure and the backup does not proceed

features.name: Settings
features.description: Configure application settings such as the Gemini API key and custom classification rules, and save them to local storage.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Switch to Settings view -> Enter a valid Gemini API key and any custom classification rules -> Save settings -> See success toast confirming settings were saved
Navigate to / -> Switch to Settings view -> Enter an invalid or malformed Gemini API key -> Save settings -> See inline validation error or error toast preventing save

features.name: Console Bar
features.description: Collapsible bottom console that streams real-time logs (info, success, warn, error) and allows clearing entries for debugging and audit.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Expand console bar -> Perform a backup or organize operation -> See live log entries appear with timestamps and log types -> Clear log entries -> See console empty
Navigate to / -> Expand console bar -> Trigger a file operation while in browser-only mode -> See error log entries describing unavailable file system operations

features.name: Toast Notifications
features.description: Transient notifications that provide immediate feedback for actions like saves, errors and operation completions; toasts auto-dismiss after a short interval.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Perform a settings save or complete a backup -> See a success toast appear and auto-dismiss after a few seconds

Navigate to / -> Trigger an AI analysis or backup action that fails (e.g., missing API key or missing Electron file APIs) -> See an error toast appear describing the failure and auto-dismiss after a few seconds

routes.description: Single-page app - all navigation is handled via sidebar state (no URL routing)

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Left sidebar with icons to switch between app sections
user_interactions: Click Organizer nav item to go to file organizer
Click Dashboard nav item to view stats
Click History nav item to view organize history
Click Backup nav item to go to file backup panel
Click Settings nav item to open settings

features.name: Folder Picker
features.description: Step 1 of organizer flow - user selects a folder to organize
user_interactions: Click "Browse" or folder icon to pick a folder (Electron native dialog or manual input)
Type a folder path in the input field

features.name: File Scanner & AI Analyzer
features.description: Step 2 of organizer flow - scans files and uses Gemini AI to classify them in batches
user_interactions: Click "Analyze with AI" button to trigger batch AI classification
View real-time progress bar during analysis

api_calls.endpoint: Google Generative AI (Gemini) API (external, via SDK)

features.name: Organize Plan & Execute
features.description: Step 3 of organizer flow - review AI-suggested file moves and execute them
user_interactions: View list of suggested file moves grouped by category
Toggle individual files to include/exclude from plan

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview statistics of scanned files (types, sizes, categories)

features.name: History Page
features.description: View past organize operations and their results
user_interactions: View list of past organize sessions
See files moved in each session

features.name: File Backup Panel
features.description: Comprehensive backup system with manual backup, auto-backup, and backup history tabs
user_interactions: Click "Backup" in sidebar to open File Backup Panel
Switch between Manual Backup, Auto Backup, and Backup History tabs
Click "Start Backup" to create a backup archive

features.name: Settings
features.description: Configure Gemini API key and custom classification rules
user_interactions: Enter Gemini API key in input field
Enter custom classification rules in textarea

features.name: Console Bar
features.description: Collapsible log console at the bottom of the app showing real-time activity logs
user_interactions: Click console bar tab to expand/collapse
View log entries with timestamps and types (info, success, warn, error)

features.name: Toast Notifications
features.description: Temporary popup notifications for user feedback (success, error, info)
user_interactions: See toast appear on actions like save settings, backup complete, errors

known_limitations.issue: File system operations (scan, move, backup) require Electron IPC - in browser/dev mode without Electron, these features are non-functional or show errors
known_limitations.impact: Core file operations will not work in browser-only mode; UI can still be navigated and tested for layout/interaction

known_limitations.issue: AI analysis requires a valid Gemini API key set in Settings
known_limitations.impact: AI classify button will fail without a valid API key configured

known_limitations.issue: Auto-backup scheduling relies on Electron main process timers
known_limitations.impact: Auto-backup scheduling not functional in browser mode
